q88.name: q88
q88.label: 88  which one would you choose as the most essential characteristics of a democracy?

1.label: Government narrows the gap between the rich and the poor

2.label: People choose the government leaders in free and fair election

3.label: Government does not waste any public money.

4.label: People are free to express their political views openly.

q89.name: q89
q89.label: 89. which one would you choose as the most essential characteristics of a democracy?

1.label: The legislature has oversight over the government.

2.label: Basic necessities, like food, clothes and shelter, are provided for all.

3.label: People are free to organize political groups.

4.label: Government provides people with quality public services.

q90.name: q90
q90.label: 90. which one would you choose as the most essential characteristics of a democracy?

2.label: Media is free to criticize the things government does.

3.label: Government ensures job opportunities for all.

4.label: Multiple parties compete fairly in the election.

q91.name: q91
q91.label: 91. which one would you choose as the most essential characteristics of a democracy?

1.label: People have the freedom to take part in protests and demonstrations

2.label: Politics is clean and free of corruption.

3.label: The court protects the ordinary people from the abuse of government power.

4.label: People receive state aid if they are unemployed.

q125.name: q125
q125.label: 125 Which of the following statements comes closest to your own opinion?
q125.category: Democratic Quality and Preference for Democracy

1.label: Democracy is always preferable to any other kind of government

2.label: Under some circumstances, an authoritarian government can be preferable to a democratic one

3.label: For people like me, it does not matter whether we have a democratic or nondemocratic regime

q126.name: q126
q126.label: 126 Which of the following statements comes closer to your own view?
q126.category: Democratic Quality and Preference for Democracy

1.label: Democracy is capable of solving the problems of our society

2.label: Democracy cannot solve our society`s problems

q127.name: q127
q127.label: 127 If you had to choose between democracy and economic development, which would you say is more important?
q127.category: Democratic Quality and Preference for Democracy

1.label: Economic development is definitely more important

2.label: Economic development is somewhat more important

q128.name: q128
q128.label: 128 If you had to choose between reducing economic inequality and protecting political freedom, which would you say is more important?
q128.category: Democratic Quality and Preference for Democracy

1.label: Reducing economic inequality is definitely more important

2.label: Reducing economic inequality is somewhat more important

3.label: Protecting political freedom is somewhat more important

4.label: Protecting political freedom is definitely more important

q129.name: q129
q129.label: 129 Do you agree or disagree with the following statement: "Democracy may have its problems, but it is still the best form of government".
q129.category: Democratic Quality and Preference for Democracy

q130.name: q130
q130.label: 130 We should get rid of parliament and elections and have a strong leader decide things.

q131.name: q131
q131.label: 131 Only one political party should be allowed to stand for election and hold office.

q132.name: q132
q132.label: 132 The army (military) should come in to govern the country.

q133.name: q133
q133.label: 133 We should get rid of elections and parliaments and have experts make decisions on behalf of the people.

q134.name: q134
q134.label: 134 I think I have the ability to participate in politics.

q135.name: q135
q135.label: 135 Sometimes politics and government seems so complicated that a person like me can't really understand what is going on.

q136.name: q136
q136.label: 136 People like me don't have any influence over what the government does.

q137.name: q137
q137.label: 137 You can generally trust the people who run our government to do what is right.

q138.name: q138
q138.label: 138 A citizen should always remain loyal only to his country, no matter how imperfect it is or what wrong it has done.

q139.name: q139
q139.label: 139 Women should not be involved in politics as much as men

q140.name: q140

q145.name: q145

q146.name: q146

q147.name: q147
q147.label: 147 If we have political leaders who are morally upright, we can let them decide everything

q148.name: q148
q148.label: 148 If people have too many different ways of thinking, society will be chaotic

q149.name: q149
